Getting Started

Quick Start Guide

Prerequisites

  • Docker and Docker Compose

  • ESP-IDF v5.0+ (for ESP32 firmware)

  • Git

Initial Setup

  1. Clone the repository:

git clone https://github.com/c-lydia/wall_e.git
cd wall_e/micro_ros_ws

  1. Start the Docker Compose environment:

docker compose up

  1. Build your ROS 2 packages:

# In the workspace container
colcon build

Building the ESP32 Firmware

cd firmware/dev_ws
idf.py build
idf.py flash
idf.py monitor

Next Steps

  • Read the ESP32 Controller documentation

  • Explore the Architecture overview

  • Check Troubleshooting for common issues
